operational_knowledge_units.title: OptiSweep exposes APIs for data retrieval and request submission
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that OptiSweep provides APIs both to get data and to make requests.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'OptiSweep provides APIs to get data and to make request.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: OptiSweep API overview: OptiSweep provides APIs to get data and to make request.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Apidog is installed on the primary server for API interaction
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that Apidog is installed on the primary server, implying it is used as a tool for interacting with the OptiSweep APIs.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'We have Apidog installed on the primary server.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Apidog reference: Apidog is installed on the primary server and is associated with OptiSweep API usage.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition consumes the same OptiSweep APIs
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the same APIs used in this context also feed Ignition, indicating an integration relationship between OptiSweep APIs and Ignition.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'The same APIs feed Ignition.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Architecture relationship: the same OptiSweep APIs feed Ignition.
